items.title: Have the Chase Sapphire Reserve? You're likely eligible for the Sapphire Preferred bonus
items.summary: Already have the Chase Sapphire Reserve? You may qualify for the Sapphire Preferred and its 100,000-point welcome bonus. Here's what to know before you apply.

items.title: After more than 16 years, why the Chase Sapphire Preferred should still be your first rewards card
items.summary: Why the Chase Sapphire Preferred, even after its 2026 refresh, is the best card to apply for first to start your rewards credit card journey.

items.summary: The Chase Sapphire Preferred Card and Chase Sapphire Reserve Card are both compelling travel rewards credit cards. items.title: How much are Chase Ultimate Rewards points worth?

items.title: Chase Sapphire Preferred vs. Bilt Obsidian Card: Which $95 card is right for you?
items.summary: Chase Sapphire Preferred and Bilt Obsidian both charge earn transferable points for $95, but they reward different spenders. Here's how to pick the right one.
